title: Official SBM Modpack [Skyblock]
description: The best Skyblock modpack you will find,
body:
# Minecraft Mods for Hypixel Skyblock & Optimization 🏹✨

## Overview 🚀
This repository includes a collection of mods designed to enhance your Minecraft experience, particularly for **Hypixel Skyblock**. Whether you're looking for quality of life improvements, optimizations, or tools for dungeons and secrets, these mods have got you covered! 🏰💎

## Mods List 🛠️

### 1. **ctjs / ChatTriggers** ⚡
A powerful framework for **Minecraft Forge** that allows you to script client modifications using **JavaScript**. Perfect for creating custom scripts and enhancing your gameplay with easy-to-create features.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Scripted client modifications
  - Use JavaScript to modify your Minecraft experience
  - Enhance Hypixel Skyblock and other servers!

### 2. **DulkirMod** 🏆
This mod is specifically made to improve your **Hypixel Skyblock** experience. **DulkirMod** brings a variety of quality of life improvements, making your journey through the game smoother and more enjoyable.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Enhances the Hypixel Skyblock experience
  - Quality of life improvements
  - Easy installation and usage

### 3. **Dungeons-Guide** 🗺️
A must-have mod for **Hypixel Skyblock Dungeons** players. It helps you find secrets, solve puzzles, and provides other useful tools to assist you during your dungeon runs.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Guide to find **secrets** and **puzzles**
  - Additional **QOL** features for dungeons
  - Helps with dungeon efficiency and completion

### 4. **NotEnoughUpdates** 📚
This mod provides a **NEI-style interface** for viewing crafting recipes and item information within **Hypixel Skyblock**. It's an essential tool for Skyblock players looking to craft items quickly and easily!  
- **Key Features**:
  - View item crafting recipes and stats
  - Search through **Hypixel Skyblock** items with ease
  - Boosts your Skyblock efficiency

### 5. **Odin** 🛡️
A lightweight **Forge mod** for **Hypixel Skyblock**, designed to optimize performance while adding specialized features for **Kuudra** and **Dungeons**. Perfect for players who want additional functionality without sacrificing performance.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Focused on **Kuudra** & **Dungeons**
  - **Lightweight** to prevent lag
  - Enhances overall **Skyblock** gameplay

### 6. **Optifine** 🎮
A must-have for optimizing **Minecraft**. **Optifine** provides performance improvements and customization options, including dynamic lighting, better FPS, and visual enhancements.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Improves **FPS** and performance
  - Adds advanced graphical settings
  - **Dynamic lighting** and other visual enhancements

### 7. **Patcher** 🔧
This mod enhances your overall Minecraft experience by improving performance, fixing **Vanilla bugs**, and adding various **Quality of Life** features.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Performance improvements for **Minecraft 1.8.9** & **1.12.2**
  - Bug fixes and optimizations
  - Adds several **QOL** features to improve your experience

### 8. **SkyblockAddons** 🌟
A must-have **Minecraft Forge mod** packed with helpful features tailored to the **Hypixel Skyblock** experience. **SkyblockAddons** aims to improve your gameplay with various enhancements and quality of life features.  
- **Key Features**:
  - Enhance **Hypixel Skyblock** gameplay
  - Improve user interface and performance
  - Packed with useful features

### 9. **Skytils** 🌌
A versatile **Hypixel Skyblock** mod that improves your quality of life, helping you complete tasks more efficiently. It provides several utility features to enhance your Skyblock gameplay.  
- **Key Features**:
  - **Skyblock-specific features** for better gameplay
  - **QOL improvements** for a smoother experience
  - **Enhanced functionality** for Skyblock players

### 10. **WaterSolver** 🌊
This mod is a simple and effective **Water Board solver** for Minecraft. Ideal for players solving puzzles related to water flow or aqueducts!  
- **Key Features**:
  - Solves **water board puzzles**
  - Easy to use and set up
  - Helps players with complex water puzzles

## Installation Instructions 🛠️

1. **Install Minecraft Modrinth app**

2. **Download the modpack** from the versions pages.

3. **Double Click the downloaded file**
 
4. **Launch Minecraft** using the **SBM Modpack ** profile. that showed up in modrinth

## Mods

- [https://github.com/Desco1/WaterSolver]
- [https://github.com/Skytils/SkytilsMod/releases]
- [https://github.com/BiscuitDevelopment/SkyblockAddons]
- [https://github.com/inglettronald/DulkirMod]

- **Patcher**: Created by Patcher Team

Happy Playing! 🎮🚀
